response: It is with mixed emotions that I share I’ll be leaving the team next week to pursue a new opportunity. Working alongside you has been the highlight of my time here—your creativity, collaboration, and kindness have made even the busiest days feel rewarding. I’ll carry the lessons from our late-night brainstorming sessions and the laughter over too many coffee runs with me always. Please don’t hesitate to reach out if I can assist in wrapping up projects or introducing my replacement—my door (or inbox) will stay open for a little while longer. Thank you for making this such a special place to grow. I’ll miss you all, but I’m excited to see where the next chapter takes us—both professionally and personally.
